steps.code:
<?php
// Create WooCommerce pages.
if ( function_exists( 'WC_Install::create_pages' ) ) {
	WC_Install::create_pages();
}

// Create collection pages.
$collections = array(
	'collection-signature'   => 'Signature Collection',
	'collection-black-rose'  => 'Black Rose Collection',
	'collection-love-hurts'  => 'Love Hurts Collection',
	'collection-kids-capsule' => 'Kids Capsule Collection',
);

foreach ( $collections as $slug => $title ) {
	$existing = get_page_by_path( $slug );
	if ( ! $existing ) {
		wp_insert_post( array(
			'post_title'   => $title,
			'post_name'    => $slug,
			'post_status'  => 'publish',
			'post_type'    => 'page',
			'page_template' => 'template-' . $slug . '.php',
		) );
	}
}

// Create About page.
if ( ! get_page_by_path( 'about' ) ) {
	wp_insert_post( array(
		'post_title'    => 'About SkyyRose',
		'post_name'     => 'about',
		'post_status'   => 'publish',
		'post_type'     => 'page',
		'page_template' => 'template-about.php',
	) );
}

// Create Preorder Gateway page.
if ( ! get_page_by_path( 'preorder' ) ) {
	wp_insert_post( array(
		'post_title'    => 'Preorder Gateway',
		'post_name'     => 'preorder',
		'post_status'   => 'publish',
		'post_type'     => 'page',
		'page_template' => 'template-preorder-gateway.php',
	) );
}

// Set front page to static.
$front = get_page_by_path( 'home' );
if ( ! $front ) {
	$front_id = wp_insert_post( array(
		'post_title'  => 'Home',
		'post_name'   => 'home',
		'post_status' => 'publish',
		'post_type'   => 'page',
	) );
} else {
	$front_id = $front->ID;
}
update_option( 'page_on_front', $front_id );
update_option( 'show_on_front', 'page' );

// Create sample products.
$products = array(
	array( 'name' => 'Signature Crewneck', 'price' => '89.00', 'sku' => 'SG-CREW-001', 'cat' => 'Signature' ),
	array( 'name' => 'Black Rose Hoodie', 'price' => '119.00', 'sku' => 'BR-HOOD-001', 'cat' => 'Black Rose' ),
	array( 'name' => 'Love Hurts Tee', 'price' => '59.00', 'sku' => 'LH-TEE-001', 'cat' => 'Love Hurts' ),
	array( 'name' => 'Kids Capsule Joggers', 'price' => '49.00', 'sku' => 'KC-JOG-001', 'cat' => 'Kids Capsule' ),
);

foreach ( $products as $p ) {
	if ( function_exists( 'wc_get_product_id_by_sku' ) && ! wc_get_product_id_by_sku( $p['sku'] ) ) {
		$product = new WC_Product_Simple();
		$product->set_name( $p['name'] );
		$product->set_regular_price( $p['price'] );
		$product->set_sku( $p['sku'] );
		$product->set_status( 'publish' );
		$product->set_catalog_visibility( 'visible' );
		$product->save();
	}
}
